flashcards.question: Troposphere
flashcards.answer: The lowest atmospheric layer (0–12 km) where all weather occurs; temperature decreases with altitude

flashcards.question: Stratosphere
flashcards.answer: The second atmospheric layer (12–50 km) containing the ozone layer; temperature increases with altitude

flashcards.question: Ozone Layer
flashcards.answer: A region in the stratosphere with high O₃ concentration that absorbs harmful UV radiation

flashcards.question: Mesosphere
flashcards.answer: The third atmospheric layer (50–80 km); the coldest layer where meteors burn up

flashcards.question: Thermosphere
flashcards.answer: The fourth atmospheric layer (80–700 km); very high temperatures but extremely thin air
